sources.name: InterVest Official Portfolio
sources.coverage: Korean VC portfolio: AI, semiconductor, robotics, space/quantum
sources.limitations: Portfolio logos confirm inclusion, not current holding, valuation, revenue or IPO timing.

sources.name: Google News RSS
sources.coverage: Company news, IPO/funding signals, media clusters
sources.limitations: Media signal only; must verify with company, filings, investors or bankers.

sources.name: Company Websites / Official News
sources.coverage: Official product/funding/customer pages when URL is known
sources.limitations: Many pages are JS-heavy; official marketing still does not prove revenue.

sources.name: Crunchbase API
sources.coverage: Funding rounds, investors, organizations, acquisitions, IPO status if subscribed
sources.limitations: Requires paid/authorized API key. Current MVP only detects credential presence and does not fabricate values.

sources.name: Dealroom API
sources.coverage: European/private company database, funding, investors, tags

sources.name: PitchBook / CapIQ / FactSet Private Markets
sources.limitations: No free public API; enter as manual evidence or import CSV.
